description: Maps normalized derivative files (under from_external/active/) back to their verified external source files. The art registries prefer active/<mirrored path> over the generated placeholders. See docs/graphics_pipeline.md and docs/asset_credits.md.

sources_imported.author: Kenney (kenney.nl)
sources_imported.status: imported + license-verified, no derivatives sliced yet
sources_imported.reason: Top-down 16px dungeon/RPG sheet does not match the cozy 64x32 isometric village; slicing the unlabeled grid into correct named sprites needs visual review. Generated placeholders remain active for all ids.
